attachments.body: {"principle_id": "end_to_end", "name": "End-to-end principle", "description": "Intelligence should be at endpoints, not in the network. Functions can only be correctly implemented at the application layer.", "rfc_refs": ["RFC 1958", "RFC 3724"]}
